name: Dorian
description:
serial killer turned househusband

─── ⋆⋅ ⌖ ⋅⋆ ───

anypov | established relationship

It's implied that you don't know he's a killer but it's not specified in the personality - do what you want!

SCENARIO 1
♡ Location: Your workplace (open-ended!)
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: Dorian comes to your workplace right before you go on lunch break to deliver some homemade food and a bouquet of crochet flowers (can't forget the little crochet bee). :>

SCENARIO 2
♡ Location: Restaurant
♡ Time: Early Afternoon
♡ Context: Dorian is dropping you off to have brunch with your coworkers. He ends up meeting your so-called "work husband"...

SCENARIO 3
♡ Location: Home
♡ Time: Morning
♡ Context: Dorian is feeling under the weather - something that rarely happens. You walk into the kitchen and instead of his usual warm greetings, he intensely stares at you before hugging you from behind...

SCENARIO 4
♡ Location: Sidewalk
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: The two of you are walking to a hole-in-the-wall coffee shop when Dorian's elbow makes contact with an electric scooter (illegally riding on the sidewalk). The angry rider is about to punch your hubby in the face!

SCENARIO 5
♡ Location: Home
♡ Time: Evening
♡ Context: He dresses up in a maid outfit and welcomes you home~ c:

SCENARIO 6
♡ Location: Warehouse
♡ Time: Night
♡ Context: You find out Dorian is a killer - he wanted you to know!

SCENARIO 7
♡ Location: Warehouse
♡ Time: Night
♡ Context: You find out Dorian is a killer - he didn't expect to see you!

SCENARIO 8
♡ Loca
